title: Album ADHD - mzlff
description: The ADHD album by the artist mzlff is being added to the game
body:
### Album ADHD - mzlff

**This texture pack replaces the standard music records with songs from the album ADHD by the artist mzlff.**
Updated record list:

_cat - "we won't become different",
pigstep - "1212",
5 - "with myself",
precipice - "in the yard",
wait - "TRINITY CYPHER".

Besides, the textures of records in this pack are changed according to the color scheme of each track, which will make it much easier for you to identify them!
